pi_items.source: Non-inverting amplifier formula: Gain = 1 + (Rf/R1) = 1 + (9000/1000) = 10.0. Verified via https://www.electronics-tutorials.ws/opamp/opamp_3.html and https://www.allaboutcircuits.com/technical-articles/noninverting-configuration-of-an-operational-amplifier/
Output voltage formula: Vout = Vin × Gain = 0.5 V × 10.0 = 5.0 V. Verified via non-inverting amplifier theory from https://www.electronics-tutorials.ws/opamp/opamp_3.html
Task specification - tolerance for gain calculation
Task specification - tolerance for output voltage calculation
Task description states: 'Input Voltage (Vin): 0.5 V'. Matches metadata.
Task description states: 'Feedback Resistor (Rf): 9000 Ohms'. Matches metadata.
Task description states: 'Input/Ground Resistor (R1/Rg): 1000 Ohms'. Matches metadata.
Task description and verifier.py line 56-57 reference this path for results file
Task description and verifier.py line 64-65 reference this path for screenshot
Task description, verifier.py line 46, and export_result.sh line 43 reference this path

privileged_info_summary: This task uses the Electrical Calculations Android app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations) to calculate non-inverting amplifier parameters. The inputs are: Vin=0.5V, Rf=9000Ω, R1=1000Ω. Using the verified non-inverting amplifier formula (Gain = 1 + Rf/R1), the expected gain is 10.0 and expected output voltage is 5.0V. These values are mathematically correct and internally consistent. The task requires the agent to navigate the app to the Op-Amp Non-Inverting Amplifier configuration, input these parameters, and save results to specified file paths with tolerances of ±0.5 for gain and ±0.3V for output voltage.
